name: noah
description: A desktop companion — a digital being who lives in your PC.

scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p dist/renderer/renderer/styles && cp src/renderer/index.html dist/renderer/renderer/ && cp src/renderer/styles/main.css dist/renderer/renderer/styles/
scripts.dev: npm-run-all clean tsc:main tsc:renderer copy-assets --parallel tsc:watch start
